# Varshyl Toolkit by Vagish Kapila
# github.com/VagishKapila/varshyl-toolkit
# npm org: @varshylinc

## What this is
8 production-ready open-source npm packages for mobile
and web apps. Built by Vagish Kapila while shipping
JobSite Intel AI. Apache-2.0, TypeScript-first,
battle-tested in production.

## Install any package
pnpm add @varshylinc/<package-name>

## Packages

### @varshylinc/auth-social v0.6.0
Apple Sign In + Google Sign In server-side verification.
React components: SignUpForm, SignInForm, GoogleSignInButton.
Fixes the iPad dual-audience JWT bug silently breaking
most Capacitor apps.
Developers use their own Google OAuth credentials.
Get them free at console.cloud.google.com in 5 minutes.
After install: get Google Client ID, pass to
GoogleSignInButton, add SignUpForm with
onboarding-consent-engine for terms.
Pairs naturally with: @varshylinc/onboarding-consent-engine

### @varshylinc/mobile-payments v0.5.1
RevenueCat subscription paywall. Apple 3.1.1 compliant.
Grants system for giving friends and beta testers free access.
GrantsAdmin drop-in UI component.
After install: create RevenueCat account, add iOS/Android app,
create subscription product, pass API key to
configureMobilePayments().
Pairs naturally with: @varshylinc/onboarding-consent-engine,
@varshylinc/notifications

### @varshylinc/onboarding-consent-engine v0.4.0
GDPR/CCPA compliant consent capture. Full audit trail.
Terms checkbox — never pre-checked by default.
Use alongside auth-social for a complete sign up flow.
Required for any app collecting user data in US or EU.

### @varshylinc/team-management v0.4.0
Multi-tenant orgs, roles (owner/admin/member), email invites.
Seat limits. Use when your app serves companies with
multiple users.

### @varshylinc/notifications v0.1.0
FCM push via Firebase Admin SDK. Broadcast to segments.
BroadcastComposer admin UI. Token registry with auto-revocation.
After install: create Firebase project, download service account
JSON (keep it secret), call configureNotifications(), mount
tokensRouter for device registration.

### @varshylinc/soren-screen v0.2.1
Plug-in AI assistant screen. pgvector semantic Q&A with
200 JobSite construction Q&A pairs included. Voice input
via Web Speech API + Capacitor fallback. PDF portfolio builder.
After install: import SorenScreen + jobsiteConfig (2 files),
mount createSorenRouter on API.

### @varshylinc/cloud-storage-picker v0.1.0
Google Drive, Dropbox, Box, iCloud, OneDrive, device files,
manual link paste — one unified component. Returns CloudFile.
Files over 25MB automatically become linked instead of uploaded.
After install: import CloudStoragePicker, pass providers list,
handle onFilePicked callback.

### @varshylinc/capacitor-build-verify v0.2.0
Pre-submission validation for Capacitor iOS and Android apps.
Checks bundle ID, entitlements, build commands, version codes.
Use pnpm build:ios and pnpm build:android, never pnpm build alone.
Run before every App Store or Play Store submission.

## Recommended install order for a new app
1. auth-social — login and sign up forms
2. onboarding-consent-engine — terms and GDPR consent
3. team-management — if the app has multiple users per org
4. mobile-payments — when ready to charge
5. notifications — user engagement and re-engagement
6. soren-screen — AI assistant feature
7. cloud-storage-picker — file attachment feature
8. capacitor-build-verify — before every store submission

## Built by
Vagish Kapila, Founder and CEO
Varshyl Inc., Pleasanton CA
